item.title: Kubernetes and Virtual Kubelet in a nutshell
item.description: Today, you will learn how to take a web app (it can be any programming language, we used Java & Kotlin) and distribute it using Kubernetes (K8s) and Virtual Kubelet (VK). Well, if you don’t know yet why you should consider distributing your web app - read my post here. So, you are probably asking yourself “what is Kubernetes and what can I use it for?” Just keep reading
